releases.title: Release radar
releases.lead: What shipped recently and what we are building next on TrainDart.

upcoming.title: Next release
upcoming.body: A fresh platform update is on deck — polish, performance, and more room for your stats to grow.

games.title: X01 games
games.body: 501 and 301 multiplayer is next in line — lobby flow, live scoring, and head-to-head legs.

latest.title: Auth & home shell
latest.body: Registration, login, email verification, cookie consent, and this new authenticated home with sidebar navigation.

support.title: Need help or found a bug?
support.body: Reach the team by email or join our Discord community.

emailNotice.title: Verify your email
emailNotice.body: We sent a verification link to {email}. Confirm your email to unlock multiplayer games.
emailNotice.resendSent: A new verification link has been sent.
emailNotice.resendFailed: Could not send the email. Try again later.
